summaries.summary: Completed 35 commits across OrderProtection/monolog and cart-widget (TypeScript), focusing on warranty resolution options, performance improvements, and security fixes. Merged 28 PRs including per-claim-type resolution features and checkout widget optimizations.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented per-claim-type resolution options (ENG-5556) with stale STORE_CREDIT guards and toggleable flag mocks for warranty processing
monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed warranty valet UI by preventing disabling all resolution options, dismissing popovers on scroll/resize, and invalidating store cache on settings updates
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Optimized checkout-widget protection toggle performance to feel instant and serialized release workflows with shared concurrency groups
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Enhanced UI security with sanitizeUrl allowlist, claim-link fallback, noreferrer attributes, and proper modal copy escaping
monolog (OrderProtection): Expanded test coverage with Playwright e2e tests for claim processing flows and in-store claim filing workflows
monolog (OrderProtection): Added OAuth security verification for Shopify analytics callbacks and integrated Claude skills for batch automation feedback and Linear GraphQL access
monolog (OrderProtection): Refactored valet UI to use semantic links for nav tabs/claim rows and decomposed account page into composable pattern

summaries.summary: Shipped 28 commits across OrderProtection services, focusing on Shopify integration fixes, metadata pipeline reliability, and MCP tool expansions. Stabilized agent respawn logic in agent-factory and advanced OAuth scope inspection features.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed critical Kafka rebalancing bug preventing Shopify tags from dropping with optional chaining guards
monolog (OrderProtection): Resolved extended warranty premium split calculation returning $0 when shipping quote exceeded premium paid
monolog (OrderProtection): Shipped /scopes skill for Shopify OAuth scope inspection across OAuth and custom-app stores
monolog (OrderProtection): Added check_proof_of_delivery and update_claim_type MCP tools with scoped workflow loading for claims-svc
monolog (OrderProtection): Migrated claims-svc and shopify-svc to database module with access-class pattern, removing stale GraphQL artifacts
agent-factory (wolzey): Fixed agent respawn logic to prevent sprite flicker and handle stale session resumption reliably
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Released bigcommerce widget support and maintenance fixes for cross-platform compatibility
documentation (OrderProtection): Added SOP guide, Education Basecamp restructure, product redirect guide, and customization docs

summaries.summary: Shipped 22 commits across OrderProtection/monolog (TypeScript), cart-widget, and woocommerce. Merged features for order metafields, product hierarchy display, Playwright migration, and B2B detection. Resolved Shopify service issues and improved infrastructure.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed Shopify service Kafka topic handling, dedup keys, float precision, and sourceOrderId validation in policy handlers
monolog (OrderProtection): Added order metafields for shipping vs warranty premium split; implemented parent-child product hierarchy in warranty table
monolog (OrderProtection): Migrated e2e testing from Cypress to Playwright for valet and concierge; removed all Cypress references
monolog (OrderProtection): Shipped billing service CSV export for payouts/invoices and Anthropic prompt caching with automation cost tracking
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Merged B2B customer detection and filtering for Shopify stores; fixed checkout extension B2B detection
monolog (OrderProtection): Enhanced dispatch service with Redis leader election for Slack socket-mode listener; implemented net billing model
monolog (OrderProtection): Added configurable coverage terms URL for extended warranty emails; implemented fully discounted replacement cost option
woocommerce (OrderProtection): Fixed shipping method assignment on reship operations

summaries.summary: Shipped 88 commits across 4 TypeScript repos this week. Delivered major UI redesigns and feature expansions in agent-factory (chat panel, vortex command, spawn animations) and monolog (widget customizer, theme branding, MCP tools). Fixed critical cart-widget persistence and layout issues.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented theme branding API with merchant fonts, Shopify CLI temp file handling, and 13+ new MCP tools for communications and diagnostics
agent-factory: Redesigned chat UI with unified panel, syntax highlighting, command suggestions dropdown, and /vortex command with epic 15s animation effect
agent-factory: Fixed zombie slot shifting, subagent resurrection logic, tombstone reservation system, and added randomized spawn animations for new agents
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Fixed settings merge logic preventing data loss, empty bullet point filtering, modal alignment, and non-blocking preference persistence
op-theme-cli (OrderProtection): Converted to TypeScript, integrated Claude Code CLI for automated theme analysis, and refactored to use temp directories instead of permanent storage
monolog (OrderProtection): Added extended warranty line items to payment section, env drift detection tooling, and hard security scoping for store-bound channels
monolog (OrderProtection): Enhanced widget customizer with missing CE checkout settings and improved valet preview with backgroundColor and hideLogo support
